title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 21 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 21 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 21 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/11/2025
Today, DCE iron ore futures market weakened, with the most-traded contract I2601 closing at 785.5 yuan,down 0.32% from the previous trading day. Traders sold at market prices; as the weekend approached, steel mills' purchase willingness declined. Overall market trading sentiment was moderate.
